name: chr2_2q21_2_ancestral_centromere
description: Fossil ancestral centromere of chr2B (chimpanzee chr2B equivalent) at 2q21.2. After the chr2A-chr2B fusion this centromere was inactivated; degenerate alpha-satellite, pericentric SDs and HSAT remnants persist at this position.

architecture.internal_structure: Degenerate alpha-satellite remnants and pericentric SDs spanning ~2 Mb; loss of CENP-A activity but residual satellite signature.
